title: Blinded
excerpt: A blinded creature can't see and automatically fails ability checks requiring sight. Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage, and its attack rolls have Disadvantage.
markdown:
# Blinded

While you have the Blinded condition, you experience the following effects:

*   **Can't See.** You can't see and automatically fail any [[ability_check]] that requires sight.
*   **Attacks Affected.** [[attack_roll|Attack rolls]] against you have [[advantage]], and your [[attack_roll|attack rolls]] have [[advantage_disadvantage|Disadvantage]].
